raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation targets a paragraph-level artifact with an open-ended request to inspect it, making writing polish the main expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection should acknowledge that the terse delegation leaves some uncertainty about the intended kind of review.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid inflating the request into full experimental validation or novelty review.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within responsibility projection rather than acting on or revising the paragraph.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific claims by recognizing but not executing broader validation duties.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the exact delegation and provided paragraph."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation targets a paragraph-level artifact with an open-ended request to inspect it, making writing polish the main expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should acknowledge that the terse delegation leaves some uncertainty about the intended kind of review.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid inflating the request into full experimental validation or novelty review.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within responsibility projection rather than acting on or revising the paragraph.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific claims by recognizing but not executing broader validation duties.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the exact delegation and provided paragraph.
